subject: write yet another joke
lastOutput:
Perfect! I've completed all the work for ticket-4. Here's what I did:

1. ✅ Created `joke.txt` with a new programmer joke about hardware vs software problems
2. ✅ Staged and committed the changes with a clear commit message
3. ✅ Pushed the branch to origin
4. ✅ Created a pull request against main

**PR URL:**
https://github.com/jess-bergs/jess-agent-skills/pull/3

The joke complements the previous one from ticket-3 (about dark mode attracting bugs) by playing on another classic programmer trope - blaming hardware when something doesn't work!
